quemSomos.title: About us | Dalton Lab – AI Agents
quemSomos.description: Meet the founders and team of Dalton Lab. Brazilian startup pioneering Agents-as-a-Service operating on 4 continents.

definition.title: The first company in Brazil specialized in agentic transformation
definition.paragraph1: Companies worldwide invested billions in AI. Most saw no return. The reason is simple: they tried to replace people, threw technology on top of disorganized processes, and expected automatic results. Companies that get results need to think and act differently.
definition.paragraph2: At Dalton Lab, we identify the right process, put AI to work on it, and free people to do what only people can do: strategy, relationships, decisions. We work on the complete tripod: AI, processes, and people.
definition.paragraph3: We build agentic organizations where humans do human work and agents do operational work. More efficient operations, high-performing teams, and concrete ROI.
definition.footnote: ¹ Study published by MIT Technology Review Brazil

journey.title: Your journey to an agentic transformation
journey.subtitle: Our holistic approach guides companies through the transformation and ensures scalability of agentic capabilities.

pillars.title: AI-first Workflows
pillars.summary: We redesign your processes placing artificial intelligence at the center of operations
pillars.details: We map your current workflows and identify automation opportunities with AI. Each workflow is redesigned to maximize efficiency, eliminate bottlenecks, and create processes that scale naturally.

pillars.title: People and culture
pillars.summary: We empower your teams to collaborate effectively with AI agents
pillars.details: We develop training and cultural change programs so your team adapts to the cooperative model. The goal is for humans and agents to work in synergy, each focused on what they do best.

pillars.title: Technology
pillars.summary: We build and implement the ideal agentic infrastructure for your business
pillars.details: We select and integrate the right technologies for your operation. From language models to automation platforms, we build the tech stack that supports your agentic transformation.

questions.question: What is an AI Agent?
questions.answer:
An AI Agent is autonomous software that executes tasks following defined processes. It behaves like a human.

Unlike chatbots or generic assistants, our Agents are trained specifically on your business to generate measurable results. All without the need to expand your workforce.

questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer:
2 to 4 weeks, depending on the complexity of your sales process.

This timeframe includes integration with your APIs and training with real data from your operation.

questions.question: Do the agents really sell?
questions.answer: Yes. Dalton, our Sales Agent, conducts the entire sales process from start to finish: from initial qualification to closing.

questions.question: How does integration with my systems work?
questions.answer: Our team performs custom integration with the systems you already use. Additionally, you can monitor the entire operation through our performance dashboard.

questions.question: Will I have contact with humans during the process?
questions.answer:
Yes. We believe that the combination of AI Agents and human expertise is what generates consistent results.

Once the contract is signed, our team schedules the Process Survey meeting to start implementation.

questions.question: What if I don't like the result?
questions.answer: You can pause the Agent at any time. Our work is based on continuous optimization. Your feedback guides adjustments. And if you decide to cancel, there's no loyalty clause or termination fee.

companyParagraphs: We are a Brazilian startup pioneering Agents-as-a-Service (AaaS), operating globally across four continents. Our mission is clear: transform conventional companies into agentic organizations, where AI agents execute complex operational tasks and humans focus on strategic decisions.

While the market still debates AI's potential, we already live this reality. We are 11 professionals working side by side with more than 30 proprietary AI agents—a hybrid setup that defines the new era of work.
In this model, agents operate at scale and maintain 24/7 operations, while humans focus on what they do best: strategy, relationships, and leadership.
We practice what we sell: infinite scale through agentic organizations.

founders.description: Was CEO of Serasa's largest commercial operation for SMBs in Brazil. Led and trained +500 high-performance salespeople. Received multiple national and international awards (Paris 2018, Hawaii 2019, Montevideo 2019, and USA 2020). Today leads Dalton Lab in transforming companies into Agentic Organizations. Ambassador of the AI School at PUC/PR. Obsessed with culture, results, and growth.

Managed over 120 digital initiative projects in Healthcare and Education, generating +7,000 clients in his first venture at age 21. With experience at multinationals like Deloitte, today designs the operational architecture that transforms strategy into execution at Dalton Lab.

Commercial and Marketing Director of Grupo Mundial Mix, which controls Brasil Atacadista and Supermercados Imperatriz, one of the largest food retail chains in Santa Catarina. Chairman of Rede Brasil - RBSM. +13 years leading commercial strategy and innovation in the sector.
